candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation line exists, but it is not labelled as being in Cost of Revenues / COGS. The selected COGS bucket is the direct row 'Cost of Revenues', and there is no explicit COGS-specific D&A row to add separately. To avoid misallocating a generic operating depreciation line to COGS, do not add it here.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row tied to COGS/cost of revenues is shown. The visible generic depreciation summary should not be assigned to COGS_DA without clearer COGS linkage.

candidates.why: A standalone operating-level depreciation summary row is shown separately from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows ('Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' and 'Other operating Expenses'). Because it sits alongside those rows rather than beneath them, it appears outside the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately. Use the summary 'Depreciation' row rather than the lower-level components to avoid double counting.

A second 'Depreciation' row appears, but the presence of 'Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets' suggests this lower row is a component with the lease depreciation row summing to the upper depreciation total. Therefore prefer the summary depreciation row only.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: This appears to be a component of the depreciation total, not the preferred summary row. Do not select separately when the summary row is available.

variables.notes: Selected the standalone depreciation summary row for separate addition to XSGA. The two 'Depreciation' lines plus 'Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets' indicate a summary-versus-components structure; choose only the summary row to avoid double counting.
